cards.rules_text: Whenever you venture, put a +1/+1 counter on Aldmore Chaperone.
cards.flavor_text: [i]Towering iron men accompany all parties leaving Aldmore Academy, acting as protection from the myriad horrors of the multiverse.[/i]

cards.rules_text: Bjarndyr Bruiser gets +2/+2 as long as it's embattled. [i](A creature is embattled if it has a counter on it or has a permanent you control attached to it.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Here's my advice to you, cub: the space between life and death is as broad or narrow as your weapon's reach.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: Whenever Gold Grubber attacks, hoard. [i](Create a Treasure token. If you control at least two Treasures, you may draw a card instead.)[/i]
cards.flavor_text: [i]“You call that buried treasure? It's just coated in a thin layer of ash and corpses. Sounds like my average holiday.”[/i]

cards.rules_text: When Herd Matron enters, distribute two +1/+1 counters among one or two target creatures you control.
cards.flavor_text: [i]The knights ensured the young survive. She ensured they would thrive.[/i]
